_comment: Synthetic fixture — pre_authorisations table, claim_utilisation table, deductible_ledger table, and claims table. All updated to reflect the 5 new test case scenarios B001–B005. B001: Hospitalisation GOLD fully approved. B002: Outpatient SILVER approved (non-panel, bill at benchmark). B003: Maternity GOLD rejected at eligibility (waiting period not met, 66 days < 270 days). B004: Surgical BRONZE approved (non-panel 60% discount, large deductible). B005: Emergency GOLD duplicate claim rejected at policy-verification.

pre_authorisations._scenario: B001 — pre-auth approved for Tan Wei Ming's pneumonia hospitalisation at SGH
B003 — pre-auth exists but claim halted at eligibility (waiting period 66 days < 270 days)
B004 — pre-auth for Ahmad's appendectomy at Novena (non-panel, Bronze plan)

claim_utilisation._comment: 2024 outpatient claim for HIC-2024-00123 — does not count toward 2025 annual limit
2025 prior outpatient claim for HIC-2023-00456 — counts toward annual limit for B002
Existing paid emergency claim for HIC-2024-00099 — triggers duplicate claim rejection for B005 (same policy_no + incident_date 2025-04-21 + claim_type emergency)

deductible_ledger._comment: 2024 deductible for HIC-2024-00123 — does not carry forward to 2025
2025 deductible for HIC-2024-00123 — starts fresh at 0.00 for B001
2025 deductible for HIC-2023-00456 — prior outpatient claim applied partial deductible
deductible_ledger._note: SGD 180 of the SGD 2,000 annual deductible consumed. Remaining: SGD 1,820 for B002.

deductible_ledger._comment: 2025 deductible for HIC-2022-00321 — no prior 2025 claims for B004
deductible_ledger._note: No 2025 deductible consumed yet; deductible_utilised = 0.00 for B004.

claims._comment: Existing paid claim for B005 duplicate-check. Same policy_no HIC-2024-00099 + incident_date 2025-04-21 + claim_type emergency already exists with status=paid.

claim_sequence._comment: Sequence counter for CLM-2025-NNNNNNN. B001 will consume next_val=1101.
